title: trigonochilum russellianum
intro: Trigonochilum russellianum, also known as Russell's Trigonochilum, is a plant species that belongs to the Apocynaceae family and is native to India. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Trigonochilum russellianum include its potential in treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Trigonochilum russellianum include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine in India to harness its medicinal properties.
